name: trae-dream-skin
description: DreamSkin Studio and its local Agent Tool for designing and applying reversible desktop themes.

scripts.check: node --check scripts/injector.mjs && node --check scripts/workbuddy-injector.mjs && node --check scripts/studio-dev.mjs && node --check scripts/build-desktop-resources.mjs && node --check scripts/after-pack.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-packaged-desktop.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-macos-installer.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-macos-release.mjs && node --check assets/renderer-inject.js && node --check assets/workbuddy-renderer-inject.js && node --check plugins/workbuddy/plugin.mjs && node --check plugins/workbuddy/catalog.mjs && node --check src/cli.mjs && node --check src/mcp-server.mjs && node --check src/studio-server.mjs && node --check desktop/main.mjs && node --check desktop/process-lifecycle.mjs && node --check desktop/shell.mjs && node --check desktop/startup-diagnostics.mjs && node --check desktop/protocol-router.mjs
scripts.studio:start: npm run studio:build && npm run studio:server
scripts.desktop:installer:mac: npm run desktop:resources && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac --arm64 && npm run desktop:verify:packaged -- --skip-agent --screenshot dist-desktop/packaged-smoke.png && npm run desktop:verify:installer
scripts.desktop:release:mac: npm run desktop:resources && electron-builder --mac --arm64 --config.forceCodeSigning=true --config.mac.notarize=true && npm run desktop:verify:packaged -- --skip-agent --screenshot dist-desktop/packaged-smoke.png && npm run desktop:verify:installer && npm run desktop:verify:mac
